transcript: Speaker A: 15 din mein English sikhane wala AI teacher ab viral ho raha hai. Aaiye unka swagat karte hain. [The AI teacher who teaches English in 15 days is now going viral. Let's welcome her.] Toh Arya, aapka kehna hai ki English sikhane ke liye grammar book ya coaching class, kisi cheez ki zaroorat nahi hai? [So Arya, you claim that there is no need for grammar books or coaching classes to learn English?] Speaker B: Haan, bilkul sahi. Pehle toh log English kya hoti hai, yeh samjhe bina hi bolne ko keh dete the. Jabki English bhi maatrabhasha ki tarah baat-cheet karte-karte hi naturally aa jaati hai. [Yes, absolutely. Earlier, people were asked to speak English without understanding what it is. Whereas English, like a mother tongue, comes naturally through conversation.] MySivi app mein English sikhne ke liye jo kuch chahiye hota hai, main step-by-step saare star sikhaati hoon. [In the MySivi app, I teach all levels step-by-step with everything needed to learn English.] Aise practice karoge toh roz progress dikhega. Isi liye 15 din mein fluent English bolna mumkin ho jata hai. [If you practice like this, you will see progress daily. That's why speaking fluent English in 15 days becomes possible.] Speaker A: Aur sunne mein aa raha hai ki pichle 2 saalon mein aapne 50 lakh logon ko English sikhayi. Yeh sahi hai? [And it is heard that you have taught English to 50 lakh people in the last 2 years. Is this true?] Speaker B: Haan, bilkul. Har kisi ko unke level ke hisaab se personalised training milti hai. Duniya ka koi bhi banda bina darr ke mere saath practice kar sakta hai. [Yes, absolutely. Everyone gets personalized training according to their level. Anyone in the world can practice with me without fear.] Speaker A: Aur suna hai ki price bhi 10 guna kam hai? [And heard that the price is also 10 times lower?] Speaker B: Haan, bas ₹1 mein. Aur 3-day ka trial bhi milta hai. Pasand aaya toh hi continue karo. [Yes, for just ₹1. And you also get a 3-day trial. Continue only if you like it.] Toh agar English seekhni hai, MySivi app install karo aur abhi se 15-day challenge start karo. [So if you want to learn English, install the MySivi app and start the 15-day challenge now.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text:
ये AI teacher ₹1 में English सिखाने का वादा करती है [This AI teacher promises to teach English for ₹1]
15 Din Mein English [English in 15 days]
Grammar Books
MySivi
10X CHEAP
MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A human interviewer talks to an AI robot teacher named Arya about the MySivi app, which teaches English naturally through conversation. The AI highlights its personalized training, 15-day challenge, and a low price of ₹1 with a 3-day trial. The ad concludes with a call to action to download the app.
